title: GlowTrigger
description: Adds a trigger command to start glowing
body:
This datapack is meant to take advantage of the very little used glowing effect

- for players. Now u can tell where you are close by with ease even if there is blocks up down or around between you and your friend! - ![glowing!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1130900872b2fced175ad269f86426a3424c9b42.png)
